summary: Completed comprehensive backend API testing for SafeGuard AI. All 35 tests passed (100% success rate). All core endpoints working correctly including authentication, emergency contacts, SOS alerts, Going Out Mode, Journey Sharing, User Settings, Fake Call Contacts, Location Tracking, and Battery/Shutdown handling.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend code is well-structured with proper Pydantic models and validation
JWT authentication is properly implemented with token expiry
MongoDB operations correctly exclude _id field from responses
All endpoints have proper error handling and return appropriate status codes
CORS is properly configured for cross-origin requests

test_credentials.note: Each test class creates unique test users with UUID-based emails to avoid conflicts

seed_data_creation: Test users created with pattern: test_{uuid}@safeguard.ai, TEST_ prefixed contacts and data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs are fully functional and tested. Audio-related endpoints (/api/voice/detect-phrase, /api/going-out/verify-voice, /api/analyze-audio) require actual audio files for full testing - these use Whisper API for transcription. The mobile app is in /app/mobile/ and uses Expo Router. Frontend testing would require Expo/React Native specific testing approach.
